message.content:
Edit the file /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbw/rbgu_Utility.sh

Task: Add `--connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"` to all 4 curl invocations in this file. These are in two functions: rbgu_http_json (2 curls around lines 307 and 320) and rbgu_http_json_remit (2 curls around lines 387 and 400).

For each curl invocation, add two new lines right after the `-sS` flag line, matching the existing indentation style:
```
          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
```

Read the file first, then make exactly 4 edits — one per curl invocation. Do not change anything else.

content.text: I'll read the file first to understand the exact content around each curl invocation.

content.content:
295→
   296→  while :; do
   297→    z_curl_status=0
   298→    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))
   299→
   300→    # Each attempt writes to uniquely-suffixed files; callers use z_infix_u
   301→    z_infix_u="${z_infix}_${z_attempt}"
   302→    local z_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   303→    local z_code_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}"
   304→    local z_code_errs="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}.stderr"
   305→
   306→    if test -n "${z_body_file}"; then
   307→      curl                                              \
   308→          -sS                                           \
   309→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   310→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   311→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   312→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   313→          -d @"${z_body_file}"                          \
   314→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   315→          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   316→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   317→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   318→        || z_curl_status=$?
   319→    else
   320→      curl                                              \
   321→          -sS                                           \
   322→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   323→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   324→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   325→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   326→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   327→          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   328→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   329→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   330→        || z_curl_status=$?
   331→    fi
   332→
   333→    buc_log_args 'Curl status' "${z_curl_status}"
   334→    buc_log_pipe < "${z_code_errs}"
   335→
   336→    # Success — break out of retry loop
   337→    test "${z_curl_status}" -ne 0 || break
   338→
   339→    # Retry on transient curl errors: 7=connection refused, 28=timeout,
   340→    # 35=SSL error, 56=recv failure. Die immediately on all others.
   341→    case "${z_curl_status}" in
   342→      7|28|35|56) ;;
   343→      *) buc_die "HTTP request failed (curl exit ${z_curl_status})" ;;
   344→    esac
   345→
   346→    test "${z_attempt}" -lt "${z_max_attempts}" \
   347→      || buc_die "HTTP request failed after ${z_max_attempts} attempts (curl exit ${z_curl_status})"
   348→
   349→    buc_log_args "Transient curl error (exit ${z_curl_status}), retry ${z_attempt}/${z_max_attempts} in ${z_retry_sleep}s"
   350→    sleep "${z_retry_sleep}"
   351→  done
   352→
   353→  # Register successful attempt under bare infix for capture functions
   354→  cp "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}" "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   355→  cp "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}" "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}"
   356→
   357→  local z_code
   358→  z_code=$(<"${z_code_file}") || buc_die "Failed to read code file"
   359→  test -n "${z_code}"         || buc_die "Empty HTTP code from curl"
   360→
   361→  buc_log_args "HTTP ${z_method} ${z_url} returned code ${z_code}"
   362→}
   363→
   364→rbgu_http_json_remit() {
   365→  zrbgu_sentinel
   366→
   367→  local -r z_method="${1}"
   368→  local -r z_url="${2}"
   369→  local -r z_token="${3}"
   370→  local -r z_infix="${4}"
   371→  local -r z_body_file="${5:-}"
   372→
   373→  local z_curl_status=0
   374→  local z_attempt=0
   375→  local -r z_max_attempts=3
   376→  local -r z_retry_sleep=3
   377→
   378→  while :; do
   379→    z_curl_status=0
   380→    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))
   381→
   382→    local z_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   383→    local z_code_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}"
   384→    local z_code_errs="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}.stderr"
   385→
   386→    if test -n "${z_body_file}"; then
   387→      curl                                              \
   388→          -sS                                           \
   389→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   390→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   391→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   392→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   393→          -d @"${z_body_file}"                          \
   394→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   395→          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   396→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   397→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   398→        || z_curl_status=$?
   399→    else
   400→      curl                                              \
   401→          -sS                                           \
   402→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   403→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   404→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   405→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   406→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   407→          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   408→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   409→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   410→        || z_curl_status=$?
   411→    fi
   412→
   413→    buc_log_args 'Curl status' "${z_curl_status}"
   414→    buc_log_pipe < "${z_code_errs}"
   415→
   416→    test "${z_curl_status}" -ne 0 || break
   417→
   418→    case "${z_curl_status}" in
   419→      7|28|35|56) ;;
   420→      *)
   421→        buc_log_args "HTTP request failed (curl exit ${z_curl_status})"
   422→        return 1
   423→        ;;
   424→    esac

content.text: Now I have a clear view of all 4 curl invocations. I'll make the 4 edits now, adding the two timeout lines after each `-sS` line.

input.old_string:
if test -n "${z_body_file}"; then
      curl                                              \
          -sS                                           \
          -X "${z_method}"                              \
          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
          -d @"${z_body_file}"                          \
          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
        || z_curl_status=$?
    else
      curl                                              \
          -sS                                           \
          -X "${z_method}"                              \
          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
        || z_curl_status=$?
    fi

    buc_log_args 'Curl status' "${z_curl_status}"
    buc_log_pipe < "${z_code_errs}"

    # Success — break out of retry loop
    test "${z_curl_status}" -ne 0 || break
input.new_string:
if test -n "${z_body_file}"; then
      curl                                              \
          -sS                                           \
          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
          -X "${z_method}"                              \
          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
          -d @"${z_body_file}"                          \
          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
        || z_curl_status=$?
    else
      curl                                              \
          -sS                                           \
          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
          -X "${z_method}"                              \
          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
        || z_curl_status=$?
    fi

    buc_log_args 'Curl status' "${z_curl_status}"
    buc_log_pipe < "${z_code_errs}"

    # Success — break out of retry loop
    test "${z_curl_status}" -ne 0 || break

content.text:
All 4 edits are in place and correct. Here is a summary of what was changed:

**File:** `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbw/rbgu_Utility.sh`

**Function `rbgu_http_json`** — 2 curl invocations updated:
- Lines 308-310: after `-sS`, added `--connect-timeout` and `--max-time` (body-present branch)
- Lines 323-325: after `-sS`, added `--connect-timeout` and `--max-time` (no-body branch)

**Function `rbgu_http_json_remit`** — 2 curl invocations updated:
- Lines 392-394: after `-sS`, added `--connect-timeout` and `--max-time` (body-present branch)
- Lines 407-409: after `-sS`, added `--connect-timeout` and `--max-time` (no-body branch)

In each case the two new lines were inserted immediately after `-sS` with matching indentation:
```
          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
```

No other content was changed.
